scripts.build: pnpm generate:api && pnpm generate:postman && pnpm generate:source && next build
scripts.generate:api: pnpm -C ../sdp-api run openapi:generate && node scripts/generate-api-docs.mjs && pnpm exec biome check --write content/docs/meta.json content/docs/reference/api/meta.json
scripts.generate:postman: node scripts/generate-postman-collection.mjs && pnpm exec biome check --write public/downloads/sdp-api-admin.postman_collection.json public/downloads/sdp-api-admin.postman_environment.template.json public/downloads/sdp-api-admin.postman_manifest.json
